The Team Behind SQ-GAN

One university, two labs, three academic generations

WangPhD, 1st author
LanMSc, co-1st
ZhouAssoc. Prof
TianPhD
LvDean, PI

All from Sichuan University, College of Computer Science, Chengdu

Academic lineage

Zhang Yi (IEEE Fellow, MachineILab 2008) → Jiancheng Lv (PhD student → Dean, DICALab) → Wang, Lan, Tian

MachineILab

Founded 2008 by Zhang Yi. Neural networks, ML, medical imaging. ~11 faculty, 20+ PhDs.

DICALab

Led by Lv. Industrial AI, NLP, image generation. Includes nuclear-industry applications.

Engineering Research Center

Ministry of Education designation. Machine Learning and Industry Intelligence.

2
Koc University

Private Investigator

Jian Wang — First Author

His PhD thesis title is the paper's problem statement

  • PhD student at SCU, 2021–present
  • All degrees from SCU: BSc 2013, MSc 2017, PhD 2021
  • Advisor: Prof. Jiancheng Lv

PhD thesis title

“小样本图像生成的对抗网络方法”

"Adversarial network methods for small-sample image generation"

Word-for-word match with SQ-GAN's problem.

jianwang.scu@gmail.com • github.com/jianwang-scu • ~87 citations

3
Koc University

Private Investigator

Wang's Research Arc

A PhD built on one problem, not a random collection of papers

2020 Abstract painting generation
2021 FusionGAN (abstract paintings)
2022 CR-GAN: craniofacial reconstruction
2024 SLIT: selective image translation TNNLS
2024 MS3D: discriminator regularization ICML
2025 SQ-GAN: style quantization CVPR
2025 ICCR-Diff: craniofacial recon + diffusion

painting → faces → translation → limited-data GANs

4
Koc University

Private Investigator

Two Papers, One Strategy

Same team, consecutive top venues, both sides of the problem

MS3D — ICML 2024

  • Fixed the discriminator
  • RG flow-based regularization
  • Kept gradients consistent
  • Zhou not yet on the team

SQ-GAN — CVPR 2025

  • Fixed the generator
  • Style-space quantization + codebook
  • CLIP alignment via optimal transport
  • Zhou joins with forensics expertise

Developed in parallel during 2024. MS3D on arXiv Aug 2024, SQ-GAN submitted Nov 2024.

5
Koc University

Private Investigator

The Supporting Cast

Xin Lan

MSc student, co-first author, corresponding

  • BSc Software Engineering 2018, MSc CS 2022–2025
  • ICML + CVPR co-first as a master's student
  • Handled reviewer correspondence for SQ-GAN

Jizhe Zhou

Associate Professor, tenured 2025

  • All degrees from University of Macau (PhD 2021, advisor: Chi-Man Pun)
  • Research at CUHK and Yonsei University (Korea)
  • "Content generation & anti-generation" (forensics + generation)
  • Was NOT on MS3D — joined at SQ-GAN stage

Yuxin Tian

PhD, Ant Group

  • Alibaba DAMO intern 2022
  • Ant Group 2024–present
  • Focus: continual learning, LLMs
  • Lab collaborator, not GAN specialist

7
Koc University

Private Investigator

Why This Problem? Why This Lab?

Lab's own applications need limited data

  • Craniofacial reconstruction (CR-GAN, ICCR-Diff)
  • Dental human identification (DHI-GAN)
  • Boneprint person identification
  • Nuclear-industry intelligent technology

Broader context

  • China's PIPL (Nov 2021): restricts biometric/medical data collection
  • Copyright concerns limit training data
  • Rare conditions, rare images, rare events

Funding

  • NSFC Major Instruments Grant
  • Sichuan Province Creative Research Groups Fund
  • Central Universities Fund

Not a side project. Institutionally funded program.

Industry ties

Tian at Ant Group, alumni at Alibaba DAMO, Zhou won Tencent AI Arena (1st/2000+) and Alibaba Tianchi (2nd/1574)

8
Koc University

Private Investigator

Summary

  • SQ-GAN is the latest output of Jian Wang's PhD thesis
  • Thesis title matches the paper's problem statement word for word
  • Two-paper arc: MS3D (discriminator) then SQ-GAN (generator)
  • Xin Lan: MSc student with ICML + CVPR in back-to-back years
  • Zhou's forensics expertise joined at the right moment
  • The lab's industrial and medical focus makes limited-data training a real need
  • Three generations, two labs, one sustained research program

Sichuan University, Chengdu

Koc University
